title: AWS Transform custom: Enterprise Code Modernization with the Learn-Scale-Improve Flywheel | AWS DevOps & Developer Productivity Blog
description: Enterprise modernization has reached an inflection point. You can transform one repository easily. Existing tools, including AWS Transform custom, work well for individual repositories, and the process is understood. But what about 50 repositories? 100? 200? When you need to modernize at enterprise scale, transforming code is only part of the challenge. Coordinating people, capturing […]
